description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set within a large, rectangular plot bordered by dense hedges. The house features a flat roof and a spacious open-plan layout, with multiple rooms visible from above, including bedrooms, living areas, and utility spaces. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a swimming pool with a surrounding patio, and landscaped gardens with trees and shrubs. The front yard is open with a paved path leading to the main entrance, while the backyard is more private, featuring the pool and additional greenery. Two cars are parked outside the property, and the entire lot is enclosed by a fence and hedges. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of neutral tones, with large windows providing ample natural light.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped gardens, set within a fenced and hedged lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above with the pool and backyard area most prominent, highlighting the rear garden and dense hedge border.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, driveway, and two cars parked outside, emphasizing the open front yard and entry path.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow with the garage, driveway, and a partial view of the pool, focusing on the side garden and fence.
description_view_3: View 3 highlights the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the pool, patio, and private backyard area, with the hedge providing privacy.
